title: En Mana Vaanil Song Lyrics Kasi
stanzas: En Mana Vaanil Song Lyrics Kasi

En mana vaanil siragai
virikkum vanna paravaigale
en kadhayai kaettal
ungal siragugal
thannaal moodikollum (2)

kala kala kala kalavena
thulli kuthithidum
chinna chiru alaiye
en nilaiayai kaettaal
ungal thullalum
thaanaai adangi vidum.

ungalai pole siragugal
virikka naanum aasai konden
siragugal indri vaanathil
paranthu dhinam dhinam
thirumbi vanthen

oru paatu podhumo
eduthu koorave
idhayam thaangumo
nee kooru.

En mana vaanil siragai
virikkum vanna paravaigale
en kadhayai kaettal
ungal siragugal
thannaal moodikollum

kala kala kala kalavena
thulli kuthithidum
chinna chiru alaiye
en nilaiayai kaettaal
ungal thullalum
thaanaai adangi vidum.

iraivanidam varangal kaetten
swarangalai avane koduthaan
manatharil ithai yaarum arivaro

naan paadum paadal ellaam
naan patta paade andro
boomiyil idhai yaaro
unarvaaro.

manathile maaligai vaasam
kidaithatho mara nizhal nesam
etharkkum naan kalangiathillai
ingae.

raagamundu thaazhamundu
ennai naane thatti kolven
en nenjil unmai undu
verenna vendum.
en mana vaanil ..

porukkai paattai sonnaar
porulatra paate aagum
vaadinen adhai naadum
naalum

porulillaa paataanaalum
porulaiye potu selvaar
potrume en nenjam
nenjam

manamullor ennai paarpaar
manathinaal avarai paarpen
maranthidaa raagam
idhu thaane.

vazhkai ennum medai
thannil, naadangal
oaraayiram paarka
vandhen naanum
paarvai indri..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'En Mana Vaanil'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the beauty of emotions associated with love.

What is the plot context of the movie Kasi?

The movie Kasi revolves around the life of a young man who seeks spiritual enlightenment and love, making the song's themes resonate with the narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Hariharan and composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'En Mana Vaanil' released?

The song was released on November 14, 2001.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Kasi, the song En Mana Vaanil serves as a poignant expression of love and yearning. It encapsulates the protagonist's emotions as he navigates through his feelings for his beloved. The soothing melody, combined with Hariharan's heartfelt vocals, evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. This song beautifully conveys the complexities of love, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Mana Vaanil is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With Kasi as its backdrop, Hariharan's soulful rendition combined with Ilaiyaraaja's enchanting composition creates an unforgettable listening experience. This song is a perfect blend of emotion and artistry, making it a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: In my heart, colorful birds spread their wings; if you listen to my story, your wings will also close.
The little waves that dance and play will stop if you listen to my state of mind, just like your dance will come to an end.
Like you, I also wished to spread my wings; I have been flying in the sky with wings, returning day after day.
Is it okay to sing a song? Will your heart bear it if I sing?
In my heart, colorful birds spread their wings; if you listen to my story, your wings will also close.
The little waves that dance and play will stop if you listen to my state of mind, just like your dance will come to an end.
I have asked God for blessings; he has given me melodies, but who knows this in the hearts of people?
All the songs I sing are songs I have composed; who will feel this on earth?
In my heart, there is a palace; has the shadow of a tree come to rest? I have not lost my way here.
There is music and there is depth; I will hold myself back, my heart has truth, what else do I need?
